description.zh-Hans: 生成成片扩散的RPG像素腐蚀材质，包含裸露金属、深浅锈层、剥落亮边与坑蚀簇，并支持铁锈、铜绿、混合和基础表面输入。
description.en: Generates clustered RPG pixel corrosion with exposed metal, layered rust, flake edges, and pitting; supports iron rust, patina, mixed modes, and a base surface input.

triggers.zh-Hans: 铁锈, 锈蚀, 腐蚀, 斑驳, 铜绿, 旧化
triggers.en: rust, corrosion, patina, weathering, aged, oxidized

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为金属表面生成铁锈或铜绿腐蚀效果，可用于旧化道具和环境纹理。
exampleUsage.en: Generates rust or patina corrosion effects on metal surfaces for weathered props and environment textures.
